name: Mazen Amr
title: Front-End Developer
tagline: Building the future, one line of code at a time.
about: I am a front-end developer and Computer Science student at Lancaster University Leipzig with a passion for building clean, immersive, and purposeful web experiences. This portfolio represents my evolution from writing static HTML by hand in Phase 1 to architecting a fully dynamic, AI-assisted application in Phase 2 — loading all content from JSON, animating with JavaScript, and documenting the entire process in LaTeX. I believe great development is about more than working code — it is about craft, curiosity, and continuous learning.

experience.title: Front-End Developer
experience.description: Designed and built responsive, accessible web applications entirely from scratch using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

experience.title: AI-Assisted Developer
experience.description: Explored AI-assisted development workflows using Claude and GitHub Copilot to accelerate delivery and improve code quality.

projects.title: CV Portfolio Website — Phase 1
projects.description: A fully handcrafted professional portfolio built from scratch with no frameworks, no libraries, and no AI. Submitted as Phase 1 of the Google AI front-end developer assessment.

projects.title: Dynamic CV Portfolio — Phase 2
projects.description: An enhanced, AI-assisted rebuild of the Phase 1 portfolio featuring dynamic JSON-driven content, immersive scroll animations, a typing effect hero section, and parallax depth layers.

achievements: Scored 90% on Assessment A — top individual submission
Solo submission competing against group projects
Completed full Git branching and PR workflow independently
